subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto a people who understand, that they may taste the sweetness of remembrance and forsake all that was and that shall be, and hold fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لقوم یفقهون لیجدوا حلاوه الذکر و یدعوا ما کان و ما یکون و یتمسکوا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @suffering; rejection of Christ
